data.title: Bread Financial Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on April 23, 2026, Bread Financial ® Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BFH), a tech-driven financial services firm offering straightforward payment, loan, and savings options, disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. Investors can access all earnings-related documents on the company's investor relations page.

data.title: Bullish to announce first quarter 2026 financial results
data.description: CAYMAN ISLANDS--Bullish, listed on NYSE as BLSH, a global digital asset platform catering to institutional clients, declared plans to reveal its Q1 2026 financial earnings on May 14, 2026. The earnings conference call is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the call through Bullish's Investor Relations website at investors.bullish.com.

data.title: OpenAI rolls out free ChatGPT for U.S. clinicians aiming to boost healthcare efficiency in documentation and patient care.
data.description: OpenAI has introduced ChatGPT for Clinicians, which is available at no cost to healthcare professionals in the United States. This tool aims to enhance efficiency in documentation, research, and patient care. This initiative is set to benefit a large number of professionals in the healthcare sector across the nation.

data.title: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Images 2.0 with enhanced text rendering, multilingual support, and visual reasoning.
data.description: The latest version of OpenAI's ChatGPT, called ChatGPT Images 2.0, has been introduced with upgrades including enhanced text rendering, multilingual support, and advancements in visual reasoning. This new version offers users more capabilities for interacting with text and images, making it a more powerful tool for a wider range of applications.

data.title: CNX Marks First Full Year of Dynamic ESG Reporting with 2025 Sustainability Accomplishments
data.description: A company based in Pittsburgh, CNX Resources Corporation (NYSE: CNX), announced on April 23, 2026, its sustainability achievements for the year 2025. This marked the first complete year following the transition from an annual Corporate Sustainability Report to a quarterly ESG Performance Scorecard.

data.title: Tapestry, Inc. to Host FY26 Third Quarter Earnings Call
data.description: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR) will discuss its fiscal 2026 third quarter results in a conference call scheduled for Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. (ET). The results will be released to the press earlier that same morning. To participate, dial 1-866-847-4217 or 1-203-518-9845 and provide Conference ID 3533756. Alternatively, access the audio webcast at www.tapestry.com/investors. A telephone replay will be accessible for five business days following the call.

data.title: MarineMax Reports Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Results
data.description: In Oldsmar, Florida, MarineMax, Inc. revealed its fiscal 2026 second-quarter results, concluding on March 31, 2026. The company, known as the world’s largest recreational boat and yacht retailer, marina operator, and superyacht services provider, reported a revenue of $527.4 million for the quarter. However, same-store sales saw a significant decline of 15%, attributing it to a challenging environment. This drop contrasts with the previous year's increase of 11%. The gross profit margin for this quarter stood at 34.4%.

data.title: Helen of Troy Reports Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
data.description: In El Paso, Texas, Helen of Troy Limited (NASDAQ: HELE) released its quarterly results for the period ending February 28, 2026, and shared expectations for fiscal 2027. In a comparison of the fourth quarters of fiscal 2026 and 2025, the company reported consolidated net sales of $470.0 million, down from $485.9 million. The gross profit margin decreased to 44.6% from 48.6%, and the operating margin fell to (10.8)% from 0.4%. This operating margin includes non-cash asset impairment charges.

data.title: Bread Financial Declares Dividends on Preferred and Common Stock
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio on April 23, 2026, Bread Financial ® Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BFH), a innovative financial services firm offering tailored payment, lending, and saving options, shared that their Board of Directors approved quarterly dividends for both preferred and common stock for the second quarter of 2026.

data.title: Apogee Enterprises Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on May 28, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 13, 2026. Apogee Enterprises, Inc. is a key player in architectural building products and services, along with high-performance coated materials for various applications.

data.title: PulteGroup, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Atlanta-based PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE: PHM) released its financial outcomes for Q1 of 2026, concluding on March 31. The firm disclosed a net income of $347 million, translating to $1.79 per share. This marks a decline from the previous year's $523 million net income, equivalent to $2.57 per share. Despite the decrease, PulteGroup remains focused on responding to market demands efficiently, optimizing its assets, and achieving robust returns during these challenging market conditions.

data.title: Energy Fuels Announces Call Details for Q1-2026 Earnings
data.description: Energy Fuels Inc., a prominent U.S. company specializing in uranium, rare earth elements, and critical materials, has announced that they will conduct a conference call and webcast on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 9:00 AM MT. The call will be held in Denver and will be available for participation by shareholders and interested parties. Energy Fuels Inc. is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol UUUU and on the TSX as EFR. This event is significant for investors and industry followers looking to gain insights into the company's operations and future prospects.

data.title: Aliphatic Hydrocarbon Solvents & Thinners Market worth $6.81 billion by 2032 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on April 23, 2026, a report from MarketsandMarkets revealed insights on the Aliphatic Hydrocarbon Solvents and Thinners Market. The market includes various types such as Varnish Makers' & Painters' Naphtha, Mineral Spirits, and Hexane, utilized in applications like Paints & Coatings, Cleaning & Degreasing, Adhesives, Rubbers, etc. Key data and trends on this market segment were shared, providing valuable information for businesses and stakeholders.
